script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== ts ==='; date -u +%FT%TZ
for bot in mskai heather; do
  echo ""
  echo "========== $bot =========="
  echo '-- service status --'
  systemctl is-active ${bot}-bot.service ${bot}-responder.service
  echo '-- responder uptime --'
  pid=$(systemctl show ${bot}-responder.service --property=MainPID --value)
  ps -o etimes= -p "$pid" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ' | xargs -I{} echo "  responder uptime: {}s"
  echo '-- inbound/outbound mtimes --'
  ls -la /home/azureuser/.${bot}-bot/activities.jsonl /home/azureuser/.${bot}-bot/outbound.jsonl 2>/dev/null
  echo '-- last 15 responder-errors.log lines --'
  tail -15 /home/azureuser/.${bot}-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
  echo '-- debug.log: stat + entry count --'
  ls -la /home/azureuser/.${bot}-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null
  echo "  entry count: $(grep -c '^=====' /home/azureuser/.${bot}-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null)"
  echo '-- last 30 debug.log lines (looking for recent claude calls) --'
  tail -30 /home/azureuser/.${bot}-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null
  echo '-- injection markers in responder source --'
  grep -nE '^# === [A-Z_]+_V[0-9]+(_VAULT)?(_REBIND)? (BEGIN|END|\(auto-injected)' /home/azureuser/${bot}-responder.py 2>/dev/null
  echo '-- py_compile syntax check --'
  python3 -m py_compile /home/azureuser/${bot}-responder.py 2>&1 | head -5
  [ $? -eq 0 ] && echo '  syntax: OK'
done
echo '===END==='
